'''bozhapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lycophytic|lycophytic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lycophytic|lycophytic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bozhapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhapithi|bozhapithi]] || [[word:bozhapiji|bozhapiji]] || [[word:bozhapishi|bozhapishi]] || [[word:bozhapiki|bozhapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhaputhuthu|bozhaputhuthu]] || [[word:bozhapujuju|bozhapujuju]] || [[word:bozhapushushu|bozhapushushu]] || [[word:bozhapukuku|bozhapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhaputhu|bozhaputhu]] || [[word:bozhapuju|bozhapuju]] || [[word:bozhapushu|bozhapushu]] || [[word:bozhapuku|bozhapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhapufthuf|bozhapufthuf]] || [[word:bozhapufjuf|bozhapufjuf]] || [[word:bozhapufshuf|bozhapufshuf]] || [[word:bozhapufkuf|bozhapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhapethe|bozhapethe]] || [[word:bozhapeje|bozhapeje]] || [[word:bozhapeshe|bozhapeshe]] || [[word:bozhapeke|bozhapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhapothotho|bozhapothotho]] || [[word:bozhapojojo|bozhapojojo]] || [[word:bozhaposhosho|bozhaposhosho]] || [[word:bozhapokoko|bozhapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhapotho|bozhapotho]] || [[word:bozhapojo|bozhapojo]] || [[word:bozhaposho|bozhaposho]] || [[word:bozhapoko|bozhapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhapofthof|bozhapofthof]] || [[word:bozhapofjof|bozhapofjof]] || [[word:bozhapofshof|bozhapofshof]] || [[word:bozhapofkof|bozhapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfthĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfjĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfshĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfkĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfthĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfjĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfshĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfkĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfthĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfjĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfshĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bozhapĂŻfkĂŻf|bozhapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozhapĂŠthĂŠ|bozhapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bozhapĂŠjĂŠ|bozhapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bozhapĂŠshĂŠ|bozhapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bozhapĂŠkĂŠ|bozhapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozhapathatha|bozhapathatha]] || [[word:bozhapajaja|bozhapajaja]] || [[word:bozhapashasha|bozhapashasha]] || [[word:bozhapakaka|bozhapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozhapatha|bozhapatha]] || [[word:bozhapaja|bozhapaja]] || [[word:bozhapasha|bozhapasha]] || [[word:bozhapaka|bozhapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozhapafthaf|bozhapafthaf]] || [[word:bozhapafjaf|bozhapafjaf]] || [[word:bozhapafshaf|bozhapafshaf]] || [[word:bozhapafkaf|bozhapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bozhapasha|bozhapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozhapshĂ«asha|bozhapshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozhaproasha|bozhaproasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozhapmuasha|bozhapmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozhapyaasha|bozhapyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozhapnkshĂ«asha|gobozhapnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozhapnkroasha|gobozhapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozhapnkmuasha|gobozhapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozhapnkyaasha|gobozhapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bozhazhapasha|bozhazhapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozhazhapshĂ«asha|bozhazhapshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozhazhaproasha|bozhazhaproasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozhazhapmuasha|bozhazhapmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozhazhapyaasha|bozhazhapyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozhazhapnkshĂ«asha|gobozhazhapnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozhazhapnkroasha|gobozhazhapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozhazhapnkmuasha|gobozhazhapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozhazhapnkyaasha|gobozhazhapnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bezhĂŠpasha|bezhĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bezhĂŠpshĂ«asha|bezhĂŠpshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bezhĂŠproasha|bezhĂŠproasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bezhĂŠpmuasha|bezhĂŠpmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bezhĂŠpyaasha|bezhĂŠpyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobezhĂŠpnkshĂ«asha|gobezhĂŠpnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobezhĂŠpnkroasha|gobezhĂŠpnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobezhĂŠpnkmuasha|gobezhĂŠpnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobezhĂŠpnkyaasha|gobezhĂŠpnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bozhfapasha|bozhfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozhfapshĂ«asha|bozhfapshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozhfaproasha|bozhfaproasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozhfapmuasha|bozhfapmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozhfapyaasha|bozhfapyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozhfapnkshĂ«asha|gobozhfapnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozhfapnkroasha|gobozhfapnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozhfapnkmuasha|gobozhfapnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozhfapnkyaasha|gobozhfapnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
